narrative:
Rúben Dias is a commanding centre-back for Portugal. His overall rating of 7.35/10 places him in the top 2% of centre-backs at this tournament. This reflects his consistent high performance, with 67% of his rating derived from club form.

Dias showcases strong defensive contributions at this World Cup, averaging 5.0 clearances per 90 minutes. He also contributes with 1.667 tackles and 1.667 interceptions per 90 minutes across his 270 minutes played. His expected assists per 90 minutes at 0.019 highlight a primary focus on defensive duties rather than offensive creation.

Dias is clearly a defensive anchor for Portugal, with 33% of his rating attributed to this World Cup. Scouts should continue to observe his dominant aerial presence and ground duels in upcoming fixtures. His ability to maintain a top 2% centre-back rating will be crucial for Portugal's progression.
